item.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_blade.need: §7Sheath into a Sophisticated Backpack to charge
item.backpack_arsenal.basic_backpack.too: §7A plain backpack without the charging mechanic.
item.backpack_arsenal.voltaic_charger_up: §7Install in backpack upgrade slots to multiply voltaic_blade charge rate (1=2x, 2=3x, max 3)
motion.the_four_primitives_and_weapons.v: Forward AOE slam. Voltaic Blade only; when charged, also calls a simulated lightning bolt at the AOE center.
Quick backward dash with 1s invulnerability and electric sparks. Voltaic Blade only (right-click slot).
